title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, futures market falling trends today; the main contract I2405 closed992.5. some traders were negative to sell; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 1040-1043 yuan/mt; decreased 2-10 yuan/mt from last Friday.
